patch.value: Public-surface consistency pass: runtime floor, SDK authoring docs, generated counts, storage/TOON wording, naming hierarchy

Verify and reconcile every public-surface inconsistency flagged by the 2026-07 strategy review across README, website (pm-cli.unbrained.dev), npm metadata, and plugin docs. Trust is a prerequisite for agent and SDK adoption; drift here undermines the category claim. Independent of the category ADR — ships regardless.

Each flagged drift verified then fixed or refuted with evidence; runtime requirement rendered from package.json engines (verified 2026-07-13: >=22.18.0; repo docs already consistent — website/plugin copy still to check) with an explicit product decision on lowering vs communicating the floor; stale compiled-JS/dist SDK authoring content deleted or versioned in favor of the TypeScript-native loader story (pm-2p7a); every public count generated from pm contracts + package catalog with labeled units; storage wording standardized to 'TOON writes; legacy Markdown reads for migration'; TOON promise phrased as 'sparse deterministic projection optimized for agent context; full JSON available' not 'only changed fields'; naming follows the pm master-brand hierarchy

author: maintainer-agent
message: Phase-1 README/website rewrite must land consistent with this consistency sweep's findings
